'''Newen Streeg''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] who governed [[Periphery/Legends|Periphery sector]], located near the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]], during the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. His flagship was the ''[[Ion Storm]]'', a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class cruiser]].

==Biography==
Unlike most other ranking Imperial officials, Streeg never attended the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] and had minimal ties to the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]]. He came to see the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as the perfect government as his mother was killed by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] when he was thirteen. Streeg blamed her death on the chaos that sprang out of the last days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]].

He was sworn to removing the criminal element along the Sisar Run, but had no idea how widespread [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Sprax]]'s empire actually was, nor how well it was connected. In fact, Streeg purchased nearly all his [[Starship/Legends|starship]] replacement parts — and many new starships — from one of Sprax's own organizations.
